fault_hypothesis: The conditional check on line 76 is incorrect. It causes a valid element to be removed on line 77 when the input lists share the same last element, violating the function's contract to preserve all elements.

spec.expr: not (merged__1 and left and right and merged__1[-1] == left[-1] == right[-1])

constraints.intent: The special-case check for a common last element should never be true.
If the buggy branch is taken, the total count of merged elements must still be preserved.
Immediately after the main merge logic completes, the list must contain all elements from both inputs.
The final returned list must contain the sum of elements from both input lists.
